business.title: Business Inquiries
business.description: For studios, production companies and agencies.

modalBusiness.title: Business Inquiries
modalBusiness.intro: Looking for high-end VFX or CGI for your next production? Fill out the form below, and our team will get back to you within one business day.

message.label: Your Message
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your project, vision, or anything you'd like us to know before we connect.

attachBrief.label: Attach Brief
attachBrief.hint: — PDF, DOC or DOCX, max 30 MB
attachBrief.uploadCta: Click to upload PDF, DOC or DOCX

source.label: How did you hear from us?

sourceOther.label: Please specify
sourceOther.placeholder: Tell us how you found us

ndaRequested.label: NDA Requirement — I'd like to discuss a Non-Disclosure Agreement before sharing project details.

inquiryOptions.specific: Option A. I have a specific project to discuss (Step 3).
inquiryOptions.general: Option B. General inquiry / Partnership / Just saying hi (Step 4).

errors.workEmailInvalid: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@company.com)
errors.company: Enter your company or organization name
errors.inquiryType: Select one of the options above
errors.targetDeadlineOther: The date must be in the future
errors.message: Write a brief description of your project or inquiry
errors.source: Let us know how you found us
errors.privacyPolicy: You must accept the Privacy Policy to continue
errors.fileType: Only PDF, DOC and DOCX files are accepted.
errors.submit400: Some fields are invalid. Please review your answers and try again.
errors.submit413: The attached file is too large. Please reduce the file size and try again.
errors.submit429: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.submit500: The server encountered an error. Please try again in a few minutes or contact us directly at info@senzostudio.com.
errors.submitGeneric: Submission failed. Please try again or contact us at info@senzostudio.com.
errors.networkError: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact us at info@senzostudio.com.

modalBusiness.success: Thank you for contacting Senzo Studio. We have registered your inquiry and, if applicable, the non-disclosure agreement (NDA). Our team will review the details and contact you within one business day.

modalFreelancer.title: Freelancer Applications
modalFreelancer.intro: Join our talent roster and be considered for future productions. Fill out the form — our team reviews all applications.
modalFreelancer.callout: Please note that we currently only collaborate with freelancers. You must be officially registered as a freelancer or self-employed in your country of residence to apply.

source.label: How did you hear from us?

sourceOther.label: Please specify
sourceOther.placeholder: Tell us how you found us

errors.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@email.com)
errors.mainSoftware: List your main software (e.g. Houdini, Nuke, Maya)
errors.expectedRate: Enter your expected daily or hourly rate
errors.reelLinkInvalid: Enter a valid https URL (e.g. https://vimeo.com/youreel)
errors.source: Let us know how you found us
errors.privacyPolicy: You must accept the Privacy Policy to continue
errors.submitGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

modalFreelancer.success: Thank you for your interest in joining Senzo Studio. We have received your profile and portfolio successfully. Our production team will review your materials and contact you directly when your profile and availability align with our production needs.

dataController.title: Data Controller
dataController.body: Senzo Studio is the sole data controller responsible for the processing of personal data collected through this website.

purposeOfProcessing.title: Purpose of Processing
items: Freelancer Application: To evaluate your professional profile, portfolio, and availability to join our talent roster and contact you for future productions.
Business Inquiries: To manage your project request, process Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs), and maintain relevant commercial communication.

privacyAndStorage.title: Privacy and Storage
privacyAndStorage.body: Your data is strictly for internal use. We do not sell, rent, or share your information with third parties. The data and links provided are stored in our internal management systems under secure protocols.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.body: You can request access to, modification, or permanent deletion of your data and materials at any time. To exercise these rights, please contact us at:
